ksa_text: Skill in managing master data and reference data governance, including master data governance policies, data quality standards for reference data, and master data management process governance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to Cloud Data Governance Lead scope — GOV-specific signals detected ("data governance", "governance polic", "data standard"). STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). Domain Data Governance (affinity 0.88) is a natural fit for this governance role. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 2 job-posting-level and 1 certification-level matches (CDMP, DAMA, IAPP, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001). Competency appears regularly in Cloud Data Governance Lead role descriptions and/or governance certification curricula.
